history.summary: Initial Steam Runtime, controller, external library, and current official core setup.
Adds verified mGBA Xbox label mapping, controller menu, left-stick movement, separate shoulder and trigger actions, rewind, and immediate capped 4x fast-forward.
Creates system directories from a versioned catalog, including reserved standalone and experimental platforms such as Switch and PS5.
Moves the Steam-distributed RetroArch frontend out of the Steam game hierarchy and consumes the shared emulator system catalog.
